tips.title: Run hrm_inspect.py locally
tips.content:
```bash
# Inspect mode (one batch, all hooks)
cd /home/developer/HRM_explore
python hrm_inspect.py \
  --checkpoint /nemo-workspace/inf-evolve/hrm/checkpoints/step_166310 \
  --data-path /nemo-workspace/inf-evolve/hrm/data/sudoku-hard-full \
  --mode inspect \
  --batch-size 32

# With wandb logging
python hrm_inspect.py \
  --checkpoint /nemo-workspace/inf-evolve/hrm/checkpoints/step_166310 \
  --data-path /nemo-workspace/inf-evolve/hrm/data/sudoku-hard-full \
  --mode inspect \
  --wandb-project hrm-inspect

# Evaluate mode (full test set)
python hrm_inspect.py \
  --checkpoint /nemo-workspace/inf-evolve/hrm/checkpoints/step_166310 \
  --data-path /nemo-workspace/inf-evolve/hrm/data/sudoku-hard-full \
  --mode evaluate \
  --batch-size 2304
```

Note: `--data-path` is required because the checkpoint config has a relative path (`data/sudoku-hard-full`) that doesn't resolve from the project directory.

Available checkpoints: `step_16631` through `step_166310` (10 checkpoints, every 16631 steps).
